title: WAdventurous Yeasty Gooey Digestive Biscuit Pilaf
description: A satvik-friendly Tunisian dish featuring a unique blend of digestive biscuits, cooked in a nimono-simmer to achieve a gooey texture and rich flavor profile. This adventurous twist on traditional biscuits serves as the perfect accompaniment to any meal.
instructions: Preheat a wooden board to medium heat.
Place the digestive biscuits on the heated wooden board, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and sprinkle salt over them, gently pressing each biscuit to coat properly.
Simmer in a nimono-simmering (low simmer) for about 20 minutes until thoroughly cooked.
Serve warm as a snack or accompaniment to your meals.
